metadata.name: financial_reporting
metadata.description: Analyze quarterly financial reports with KPI extraction and trend analysis

data.task: Extract all financial metrics, KPIs, and key figures from the uploaded quarterly report. Output structured JSON with categories: revenue, expenses, margins, cash_flow, headcount.
Analyze the extracted metrics. Calculate quarter-over-quarter changes, identify anomalies, flag any metrics outside normal ranges. Compare against provided previous quarter data if available.
Query historical performance data to provide 4-quarter trend context for the analyzed metrics. Generate trend analysis and YoY comparisons.

Generate executive summary combining all analysis. Include: key highlights (3-5 bullets), areas of concern, recommendations, and KPI dashboard data. Format as markdown suitable for board presentation.
